---
title: "Interactive Apps"
subtitle: "Explore mathematical concepts through interactive visualizations"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: 250px
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Python-Powered Visualizations
These interactive apps use [Pyodide](https://pyodide.org/) to run Python code directly in your browser. No server-side computation is needed - everything runs in your web browser!
:::

[Back to blog home](../index.html)
